# Decision Template

Use this template for `project/decisions/DEC-YYYYMMDD-NNN-short-name.md`.
Create a decision record only when a project-level choice becomes durable enough to re-read later.

## Status
Choose one:
- `accepted`
- `superseded`
- `revisit_needed`

## Context
Why did this decision need to be made?

## Options considered
What realistic options were considered?

## Decision
Which option was chosen?

## Reasoning
Why did this option win?

## Affected area
Which control files, workflow layers, or project boundaries does this decision affect?

## Revisit trigger
Under what condition should this decision be reopened?
